title: Dekton Refillable Carpenter Pencil-high Impact Abs Anti-slip Grip| Lead Work On Timber, Metal, Ceramic Concrete|Longer Than A Traditional Carpenters Pencil| No Sharpening Required|Includes Pocket Clip
features: Ideal for marking wood and other materials
Suitable for general purpose, workshop, automotive, crafts and hobbies.
An essential part of your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide. DEKTON Refillable Carpenters Pencil Lead works on timber, metal, ceramic and concrete. Non-slip grip. Lead lasts 2-3 times longer than a traditional. carpenters pencil. Includes 3 lead pieces and a pocket clip.
